internal_ip.description: The internal IP address of a workload VM.

parent.description: The resource name of the private cloud to create a new external address in. Resource names are schemeless URIs that follow the conventions in https://cloud.google.com/apis/design/resource_names. For example: projects/my-project/locations/us-west1-a/privateClouds/my-cloud

name.description: The ID of the external IP Address.
